nasb.text: Now if any man builds on the foundation with gold, silver, precious stones, wood, hay, straw,

esv.text: Now if anyone builds on the foundation with gold, silver, precious stones, wood, hay, straw—

cnv.text: 如果有人用金、銀、寶石、草、木、禾稭，在這根基上建造，

ccb.text: 人们用金、银、宝石、草、木或禾秸在这根基上建造，

csbs.text: 如果有人用金、银、宝石，木、草、禾秸在那根基上建造，
